title: SimplyCoins
body:
## Description Adds four tiers of coins, with each tier requiring eight of the previous to craft. Coins do not have a way to be obtained by default, nor do they do anything: they are intended to be used as currency in multiplayer servers, and it is expected for server owners to give them out for an event or add them to loot tables.
**Note**: At the moment, 1.17 support isn't planned. While I love 1.17 and it could be ported easily, SimplyCoins is made for a 1.16.5 modpack I'm working on. ## Requires * Architectury ([Forge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/architectury-forge)/[Fabric](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/architectury-fabric)) * [Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api) (Fabric only) ## Planned Features * A tile that lets you easily create shops. ## Credits * pbone: Developer, artist. * [Game-Icons.net](https://game-icons.net/): Icon.
